mapper.select: SELECT * FROM USERS WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT * FROM USERS WHERE name = #{name, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT * FROM USERS WHERE email = #{email, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler} AND name = #{name, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT user_id, phone FROM USERS WHERE phone IS NOT NULL AND deleted_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_USERS.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO USERS ( user_id, email, password_hash, name, phone, ci_value, birth_date, job, income_level_code, credit_score, marketing_agree, privacy_agree, status_code, is_email_verified, is_phone_verified, push_enabled, login_fail_count, created_at, deleted_yn ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{name}, #{phone, typeHandler=AesTypeHandler}, #{ciValue, typeHandler=AesTypeHandler}, #{birthDate, typeHandler=AesBirthDateTypeHandler}, #{job, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, #{incomeLevelCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, #{creditScore, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{marketingAgree, jdbcType=CHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, 'Y', 'ACTIVE', 'N', 'N', 'Y', 0, SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'N' )
mapper.update:
UPDATE USERS
name = #{name}, phone = #{phone, typeHandler=AesTypeHandler}, job = #{job}, income_level_code = #{incomeLevelCode}, credit_score = #{creditScore}, push_enabled = #{pushEnabled}, marketing_agree = #{marketingAgree, jdbcType=CHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler},
updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul'
WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
UPDATE USERS SET is_email_verified = #{isEmailVerified, jdbcType=CHAR}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
UPDATE USERS SET is_phone_verified = #{isPhoneVerified}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE USERS SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, last_password_changed_at = #{lastPasswordChangedAt}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE USERS SET login_fail_count = login_fail_count + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT login_fail_count FROM USERS WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS SET login_fail_count = 0, locked_until = NULL WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE USERS SET locked_until = #{lockedUntil} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE USERS SET last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE USER_SESSIONS SET revoked_yn = 'Y', revoked_at = SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND session_id != #{currentSessionId} AND revoked_yn = 'N'
UPDATE USER_SESSIONS SET revoked_yn = 'Y', revoked_at = SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AUDIT_LOGS ( actor_type_code, actor_id, action_type_code, target_type_code, target_id, description, ip_address, created_at ) VALUES ( #{actorType}, #{actorId}, #{actionType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, #{ipAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' )
INSERT INTO USER_PASSWORD_HISTORIES (user_id, password_hash, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{passwordHash}, SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul')
mapper.select: SELECT password_hash FROM USER_PASSWORD_HISTORIES WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM USER_PASSWORD_HISTORIES WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND history_id NOT IN ( SELECT history_id FROM USER_PASSWORD_HISTORIES WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY )
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS SET cdd_status_code = #{cddStatusCode, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT uc.user_card_id, cv.card_id, c.card_name, c.company_name, ci.image_url AS card_image_url, uc.card_status, uc.card_number, uc.issued_at FROM USER_CARDS uc INNER JOIN CARD_VERSIONS cv ON uc.version_id = cv.version_id INNER JOIN CARDS c ON cv.card_id = c.card_id LEFT JOIN CARD_IMAGES ci ON c.card_id = ci.card_id AND ci.image_type = 'THUMBNAIL' WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY uc.issued_at DESC

SELECT ca.credit_app_id AS applicationId, ca.card_id, c.card_name AS cardName, ci.image_url AS cardImageUrl, ca.application_status AS applicationStatus, ca.applied_at AS appliedAt FROM CREDIT_CARD_APPLICATIONS ca INNER JOIN CARDS c ON ca.card_id = c.card_id LEFT JOIN CARD_IMAGES ci ON ci.card_id = c.card_id AND ci.image_type = 'THUMBNAIL' WHERE ca.user_id = #{userId} UNION ALL SELECT ca.check_app_id AS applicationId, ca.card_id, c.card_name AS cardName, ci.image_url AS cardImageUrl, ca.application_status AS applicationStatus, ca.applied_at AS appliedAt FROM CHECK_CARD_APPLICATIONS ca INNER JOIN CARDS c ON ca.card_id = c.card_id LEFT JOIN CARD_IMAGES ci ON ci.card_id = c.card_id AND ci.image_type = 'THUMBNAIL' WHERE ca.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY appliedAt DESC

SELECT usp.category_id, cc.category_name, usp.monthly_amount, cc.icon_code FROM USER_SPENDING_PATTERNS usp INNER JOIN CARD_CATEGORIES cc ON usp.category_id = cc.category_id WHERE usp.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY usp.monthly_amount DESC
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO USER_SPENDING_PATTERNS usp USING DUAL ON (usp.user_id = #{userId} AND usp.category_id = #{categoryId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET monthly_amount = #{monthlyAmount}, source = #{source}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (user_id, category_id, monthly_amount, source, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{monthlyAmount}, #{source}, SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul')
mapper.select: SELECT uc.user_card_id AS userCardId, c.card_name AS cardName, NVL(SUM(t.amount), 0) AS amount FROM USER_CARDS uc INNER JOIN CARD_VERSIONS cv ON uc.version_id = cv.version_id INNER JOIN CARDS c ON cv.card_id = c.card_id LEFT JOIN CARD_TRANSACTIONS t ON t.user_card_id = uc.user_card_id AND t.paid_year = #{year} AND t.paid_month = #{month} AND t.status = 'APPROVED' WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.deleted_yn = 'N' GROUP BY uc.user_card_id, c.card_name ORDER BY amount DESC
